moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week Underway
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships 2026 is in full swing at the All England Club, with quarter-finals today and the Men's and Women's Singles Finals approaching this weekend.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court drama! Wimbledon is heating up with the quarter-finals today. Who are you backing for the trophy this weekend?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass is cut, the tension is rising! We're deep into the second week of Wimbledon 2026. Who will make it to the finals?

moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the USA, enters its high-stakes quarter-final stage this week as teams battle for a spot in the semi-finals.

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Final week at the World Cup 2026! Who are you cheering on to make it through to the semis?

angles.name: UK Fan Focus
angles.copy: The World Cup drama intensifies! Which nation do you think has what it takes to lift the trophy this year?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, having cemented his place in music history and continued a successful solo career.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer of The Beatles. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

angles.name: Music Legacy
angles.copy: From 'Yellow Submarine' to his All-Starr Band, Ringo Starr has left an indelible mark on music. Celebrating his 86th today!

moments.title: Michelle Branch Turns 43
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'The Game of Love' with Santana, celebrates her 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Throwback
angles.copy: Remember 'Everywhere'? Happy 43rd birthday to the fantastic Michelle Branch! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's 43rd birthday today! A singer-songwriter with some serious staying power. Which of her songs is on your playlist?

moments.title: Pitbull to Headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Mr. Worldwide, Pitbull, is set to bring his high-energy show to American Express presents BST Hyde Park this Friday, July 10th, with support from Kesha.

angles.name: London Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Pitbull is bringing the party to BST Hyde Park this Friday. Who's heading down for some Mr. Worldwide action?

angles.name: Dance Party Anticipation
angles.copy: Dale! Pitbull hits BST Hyde Park this Friday! Expect non-stop energy and all the hits. What's your go-to Pitbull track?

moments.title: Beck Celebrates 56th Birthday
moments.blurb: The innovative American musician Beck, known for his genre-bending alternative rock, folk, and hip-hop influences, turns 56 tomorrow, July 8th.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Beck turns 56! From 'Loser' to 'Odelay', his sound is truly unique. What's your favourite Beck album?

angles.name: Birthday Tease
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true original! Beck's 56th birthday is tomorrow. What's the first song that comes to mind when you think of him?

moments.title: Marc Almond Turns 69
moments.blurb: Soft Cell frontman and influential synth-pop artist Marc Almond celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Tainted Love still sounds incredible! Happy 69th birthday to the iconic Marc Almond of Soft Cell, celebrating on Thursday!

angles.name: Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 69th birthday to the distinctive voice of Marc Almond, a true pioneer of synth-pop and new wave. What's your favourite Soft Cell track?

moments.title: Arlo Parks Turns 26
moments.blurb: Mercury Prize-winning British indie-pop artist Arlo Parks celebrates her 26th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: New Music Star
angles.copy: Happy 26th birthday to the incredible Arlo Parks! A unique voice in modern music, what's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Indie Vibe
angles.copy: Celebrating Arlo Parks' 26th birthday on Thursday! Her poetic lyrics and chilled sound are a breath of fresh air. Which track are you playing?

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi lead guitarist and co-songwriter Richie Sambora, known for his iconic riffs and stage presence, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Livin' on a Prayer and so much more! Happy 67th birthday to the legendary Richie Sambora of Bon Jovi this Saturday. What's your favourite guitar solo from him?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Throwback
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Bon Jovi's iconic guitarist, Richie Sambora, this Saturday! His riffs defined an era.

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Closes BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Scottish superstar Lewis Capaldi will headline the final two nights of American Express presents BST Hyde Park this weekend, July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: London Weekend Gig
angles.copy: Hyde Park is ready for Lewis Capaldi! He closes out BST this weekend with two massive shows. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Our very own Lewis Capaldi is set to play two huge headline gigs at BST Hyde Park this weekend! Send us your favourite Capaldi song!

angles.name: Emotional Anthems
angles.copy: Get ready for all the feels! Lewis Capaldi takes over BST Hyde Park this weekend. Which of his ballads gets you every time?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins Next Week
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four major championships, tees off at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, from July 16-19, 2026, with practice days from July 12.

angles.name: Golf Major Build-up
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is calling! The Open Championship begins next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for Champion Golfer of the Year?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Golf's biggest stars are heading to Royal Birkdale next week for The Open Championship! Get ready for a fantastic week of sport in the North West.

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 29
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 29th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Star
angles.copy: Happy 29th birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings this Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS anthem?

angles.name: Boyband Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Luke Hemmings' 29th birthday next week! From 5SOS hits to his solo work, he's a pop-rock icon.
